headline: Stock Market Today: Small Caps Lead Gains On Trump Peace Plan; These AI, Chip Plays Rally (Live Coverage)
summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index gains Wednesday as President Donald Trump sends a peace plan to Iran. Oil prices take a dive.
